local_validation.notes: The nested-call proof executes hEnv.EndResultStack(GetTag(strTag)) from original container-Rule.bml. The receiver-call regression was updated because generic source-order execution now reaches the nested EndResultStack call.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A .bml method body can now evaluate an implicit self-call argument before invoking a receiver method, covering the Rule.Match EndResultStack(GetTag(strTag)) thesis shape.
test_flows: python3 scripts/audit_bml_bmf_kernel_natives.py before commit to prove no new BML/BMF host-native semantics were introduced.

phase_gate.reason: Nested receiver-call arguments are now covered for the real Rule.Match shape. Full thesis parity still requires multi-argument receiver/self calls, member assignments, declarations with initialization, comparisons, if/else, loops, casts, exceptions, and full BMF rule execution from the companion code.
